songs.title: The Rock Show
songs.album: Take Off Your Pants and Jacket
feed: “The Rock Show” by blink-182 reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 51 spots to #1.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 51 spots to #1.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 1505% to 931 points.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 51 spots to #1.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 342 sales units.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 570 streams units.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 802,452 total units.
